UG-22  DESIGN LOADS. Pressure vessels shall be designed to withstand the following synthetic load categories as required by UG-23: (a) internal or external design pressure as determined in accordance with UG-27 or UG-28; (b) dead weight of the vessel and permanent attachments; (c) superimposed static reactions from piping, insulation, and supported equipment; (d) dynamic reactions resulting from pressure or thermal cycling, when applicable. Vessels intended for low-temperature service shall comply with UCS-66, except as permitted by UCS-67 for reduced MDMT. For hydrostatic test loading, see also UG-99. Corrosion allowance shall be applied as required by UG-25.
